requirements_addressed: Standard secret patterns detected and replaced with [REDACTED]
cmd, stdout_tail, stderr_tail all redacted before event emission
Tool names sanitised against shell metacharacters
No secret values appear in emitted events
Unit tests cover all standard patterns plus edge cases

completion_promises.criterion_text: Standard secret patterns detected and replaced with [REDACTED]
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented DEFAULT_REDACTION_PATTERNS list with 7 regex patterns covering: OpenAI sk- keys, AWS AKIA keys, GitHub ghp_/ghs_ tokens, Bearer JWT tokens, PASSWORD/PASS/SECRET env vars, token=/api_key= patterns, and URL-embedded credentials. SecretRedactor.redact() applies all patterns. Tests: TestAPIKeyRedaction (4 tests), TestBearerTokenRedaction (2 tests), TestPasswordRedaction (3 tests), TestGenericTokenRedaction (2 tests), TestURLCredentialRedaction (2 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: cmd, stdout_tail, stderr_tail all redacted before event emission
completion_promises.evidence: redact_tool_exec_event() creates a new ToolExecEvent with redactor.redact() applied to cmd, stdout_tail, and stderr_tail fields. Tests: test_cmd_field_redacted, test_stdout_tail_redacted, test_stderr_tail_redacted, test_all_three_fields_redacted_simultaneously all verify secrets are removed from each field.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tool names sanitised against shell metacharacters
completion_promises.evidence: sanitise_tool_name() strips all shell metacharacters (; | & $ ` > < ( )) from tool names. redact_tool_exec_event() applies it to event.tool_name. Tests: TestSanitiseToolName class with 10 tests covering each metacharacter individually and all at once, plus test_tool_name_sanitised in integration tests.

TestContentPreservation class with 5 tests: plain text unchanged, empty string preserved, normal test output preserved, mixed content only secrets redacted (surrounding text verified intact), multiline non-secret lines unmodified. Also test_non_redacted_fields_preserved verifies non-text event fields (run_id, task_id, exit_code, latency_ms, attempt) are preserved.

SecretRedactor accepts optional patterns parameter. Tests: test_custom_patterns (custom pattern list), test_empty_patterns_list (no redaction), test_add_custom_pattern (project-specific), test_extend_default_patterns (defaults + custom combined), test_custom_patterns_via_redactor (custom redactor passed to redact_tool_exec_event).

completion_promises.criterion_text: No secret values appear in emitted events (validated by test)
completion_promises.evidence: test_no_secrets_emitted_comprehensive creates a ToolExecEvent with 4 different secret types across cmd, stdout_tail, and stderr_tail. After redaction, model_dump() is called and the entire stringified dict is scanned to verify none of the secret values leak through. Also test_returns_new_event_not_mutated_original verifies original event is not mutated.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all standard patterns plus edge cases
completion_promises.evidence: 48 tests total covering: all 7 default patterns (13 pattern tests), tool name sanitisation (10 tests), content preservation (5 tests), event integration (8 tests), configurable patterns (3 tests), edge cases (5 tests: multiple secrets, repeated patterns, very long strings, unicode, newlines). Coverage: 97% on redaction.py (51/51 statements, 1 branch miss on defensive None guard).
